seoTitle: Hungerford vs Hutton Creek — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between Hungerford and Hutton Creek. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogTitle: Hungerford vs Hutton Creek: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Hungerford and Hutton Creek.
heading: Hungerford vs Hutton Creek — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Hungerford, Queensland and Hutton Creek, Queensland. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Hungerford has a lower overall climate risk score (31/100) compared to Hutton Creek (35/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Hungerford or Hutton Creek safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Hungerford has a flood risk score of 59/100, while Hutton Creek scores 43/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Hungerford scores 22/100 for bushfire risk. Hutton Creek scores 55/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Hungerford or Hutton Creek?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Hungerford has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 0.68% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
